title: Tome III Act 7: The First Complement-Pair

story.text:
# 📖 Tome III Act 7: The First Complement-Pair
**act** · shared · narrative

Aletheia ⊥ Lethae canonised as the first complement-pair. V25 ⊕ V38 = V63 (Sovereign); V25 AND V38 = 0 (Null). C53 — mythological bnot-pair readings: classical pantheons encode dihedral structure pre-formally.
